title: HarnessEvent
description: Discriminated union of events emitted by SdkHarnessAdapter.astream_invoke. Harness-agnostic and protocol-agnostic; produced by harnesses and consumed by transport adapters (e.g., the AG-UI emitter).

RunStarted.description: Marks the beginning of a harness invocation. MUST be the first event in any stream.

run_id.description: Opaque run identifier, unique within the server process for the run's lifetime.

RunFinished.description: Marks the end of a harness invocation. MUST be the last event. If error is non-null, the run failed (Phase 1 of the design.md D8 two-phase error contract).

oneOf.description: Exception class name only (per D8 redaction rule). Pattern matches a Python class identifier with optional dotted module qualifier — lowercase or underscore-leading module segments followed by an uppercase-leading class name. Examples: 'RuntimeError', 'asyncio.CancelledError', 'agent_framework.QuotaError'. MUST NOT contain message body, traceback, or wrapped-exception detail.

error.description: Null on success. On failure: exception class name only — never the message body.

TextDelta.description: A partial chunk of an assistant text message. Multiple TextDeltas with the same message_id concatenate into one logical message.

message_id.description: Stable within a single logical assistant message; changes when a new message begins.

text.description: Partial chunk. MAY be empty (e.g., as a keepalive).

ToolCallStart.description: Marks the start of a tool invocation. Subsequent ToolCallArgs / ToolCallEnd events share the same call_id.

ToolCallArgs.description: A partial chunk of the tool invocation's JSON arguments. Concatenating all ToolCallArgs.args_chunk values for one call_id yields the full JSON args payload.

ToolCallEnd.description: Marks the end of a tool invocation. Optionally carries the tool's result.

result.description: Optional tool result; shape is tool-specific.
